contentAccuracyAudit.pattern: 3rd consecutive cycle with stale stats discovered — PR #1224 fixed stats bar but missed inline text references. Root cause: hardcoded numbers in 10+ locations with no build-time sync. Recommend: add a script that reads invariant/pattern counts from source and patches index.html at deploy time.
contentAccuracyAudit.risk: medium — stale numbers are embarrassing but not product safety issues

blockers.requiredAction: Human to run pnpm install in content-agent worktree, or ops to patch hook to allow bootstrapping. 5 consecutive cycles — escalating to red next cycle.

escalations: HIGH: Content agents silent for 5 consecutive cycles. #995 unresolved. Human intervention required.
MEDIUM: OWASP blog post draft complete at docs/blog/ — needs human to publish to LinkedIn.
MEDIUM: v2.9.1 shipped with a significant policy fix (wildcard → shell.exec enforcement). Security-angle announcement in #1260 should be prioritized.
productInsights: v2.9.1 is current release. Wildcard policy fix is the biggest marketing story: 'if you use action: "*" in your policy, you were not blocking shell commands until v2.9.0. Upgrade now.' Strong security-angle CTA.
24 invariants (up from 22 last announced). No-env-var-modification and credential-file-creation are new additions — enterprise compliance angle.
9 active squads = credible 'autonomous swarm' story, but site still overclaims 26/5. Fix before any swarm-focused content.
OWASP Agentic Top 10 blog post is complete and ready — highest-leverage publish action available right now.

dogfoodReport.status: clean — no governance issues encountered this run. All operations (git, gh pr, gh issue) executed without denial.
